subcodes.first_line: I commune with Thee, O my God and my Beloved, Goal of all them that have detached themselves unto Thee, that Thou mayest cause to descend from the clouds of Thy holy heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اناجیک یا الهی و مقصودی و مقصد کل المنقطعین الیک بان تنزل من سحاب سماء قدس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation
